title: Published industrial case studies
author: Wowra, Karoline
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The deliverable “D 7 4 Published industrial case studies” provides a presentation of the BioSPRINT biorefinery concepts showing the processing steps and intensification. including a short introduction to the BioSPRINT project, the different biorefinery concepts with the processing steps and intensification technology applied in each steps, the main opportunities and challenges for the BioSPRINT concept and measures necessary for a further concept development and implementation.
steps_raw: The deliverable “D 7 4 Published industrial case studies” provides a presentation of the BioSPRINT biorefinery concepts showing the processing steps and intensification. including a short introduction to the BioSPRINT project, the different biorefinery concepts with the processing steps and intensification technology applied in each steps, the main opportunities and challenges for the BioSPRINT concept and measures necessary for a further concept development and implementation.
